Headquartered in Edmonton, Alberta - Valard is Canada’s premier utility contractor, with full-service capabilities for transmission, distribution, substations, foundations, telecommunications and renewable energy. 

Serving clients across the country, Valard has distinguished itself in safety, environmental responsibility and community stewardship. 

We provide comprehensive EPC (engineering, procurement, construction) and maintenance services to utilities, independent power producers, mining, oil and gas industries and rural electric associations throughout all Canadian provinces and territories.

title: Substitute Library Assistant
description_text:
Pay
Hiring Range: $16.39 - $19.67, Hourly
Pay Range: $16.39 - $22.95, Hourly
Essential Job Duties
Substitute Library Assistants provide excellent service and connect community members with library services and materials. Under the direction of the Human Resources Manager, and with an unwavering commitment to diversity, equity, and inclusion, the Substitute Library Assistant will:
Provide hands-on customer service at the Help Desk. 
Assist patrons with use of the Library's public computers, and Library supported software.
Assist patrons with directional, basic collection, and Library account questions.
Actively participate in training.
Assist with various projects under the guidance of the Agency/Department Manager.
Perform other similar duties as assigned.
Education and Experience
High school diploma or equivalent required.
Cash register experience preferred.
At least 2 years of work experience in a public library and/or retail preferred.
Hours
This is an “On Call” position, with no regularly scheduled hours.
Required to work at least one shift per bi-weekly pay period based on the needs of the Library.
Requirements 
Willingness to adapt to changes in the work environment.
A strong commitment to excellent and genuine customer service.
Excellent oral and interpersonal communication skills.
Strong competence and experience using and troubleshooting computers, software, office equipment, and mobile devices. Advanced knowledge of Internet browsing, Microsoft Office, Google Suite, and Windows and Mac OS.
Physical agility and strength to bend, reach, and carry library materials (20-25 lbs.)
Maintain patron and staff confidentiality.
Dependability, punctuality, and good work habits.
Bilingual (Spanish and English), strongly preferred.
Ability to:
Work harmoniously and cooperatively with co-workers and patrons.
Problem solve in a professional manner with Library patrons and co-workers.
Work independently and as a team player.
Work patiently and creatively with all ages.
Communicate and interpret the Library’s services, philosophy, and policies to customers in a courteous, friendly, and positive manner.
Learn the Library’s automated system, the Internet, on-line databases, as well as self-service technology.
Personal transportation and telephone.
ai_core_responsibilities: Substitute Library Assistants provide customer service at the Help Desk and assist patrons with library services and materials. They also participate in training and assist with various projects as assigned.
ai_requirements_summary: A high school diploma or equivalent is required, along with at least 2 years of experience in a public library or retail. Strong customer service skills and computer proficiency are essential.
linkedin_org_slogan: The St. Joe County Public Library connects members of our community to learning, resources, culture, and each other.
linkedin_org_locations: 304 S. Main St., South Bend, IN 46601, US
linkedin_org_description:
The St. Joe County Public Library (SJCPL) has been serving our community since 1889. We’re a dynamic, creative organization that believes libraries should spark curiosity, build community, and make learning feel fun.

Across 10 locations, we offer everything from book clubs and author talks to digital media production, maker tools, and hands-on learning spaces. Our culture is collaborative, innovative, and full of people who genuinely love what they do.

If you’re looking for a workplace where ideas matter, creativity is celebrated, and every day brings something new, SJCPL is a place to belong. Learn more at sjcpl.org.

title: Sr Manager Marketing Demand Generation
locations_alt_raw: New York, New York, United States
locations_derived: New York, New York, United States
description_text:
ABOUT UPCLEAR
UpClear makes a SaaS revenue management software that is used by some of the most recognizable consumer goods brands in the world. Our system supports Trade Promotion Management, Trade Promotion Optimization, Integrated Business Planning and Revenue Management.
We serve more than 80 brands in over 20 countries. Our growth is substantial and consistent; we have been on the Inc 5000 list of fastest growing private companies for nine years.
UpClear's global headquarters is in New York City and we have international offices in London, Paris, and Singapore.
This role requires 4 days on site collaboration per week. You must be able to commute to our West 22nd Street office in New York.

Role Overview 
We are seeking a Senior Manager, Marketing to play a critical, hands-on role at the intersection of marketing, presales, and revenue generation. This is not a purely strategic role - it is an execution-heavy position for someone who enjoys prospect outreach, early-stage conversations, and translating marketing activity directly into qualified sales opportunities. 
You will personally drive early demand, qualify inbound interest, conduct introductory demonstrations, and ensure a clean handoff to Sales - while also serving as a senior contributor who coordinates marketing initiatives and strengthens team execution. 
Key Responsibilities 
Presales Demand Generation 
Proactively identify, research, and engage target prospects through direct outreach, personalized messaging, and campaign follow-up 
Book and manage first meetings with qualified prospects, acting as a trusted first point of contact 
Partner closely with Sales to align outreach priorities and target accounts 
Inbound Lead Qualification & Introductory Demos 
Qualify inbound leads to assess fit, urgency, and buying intent 
Conduct introductory product demonstrations tailored to prospect needs and maturity 
Clearly articulate UpClear’s value proposition, differentiation, and use cases for CPG brands 
Sales Handoff & Pipeline Support 
Execute clean, well-documented handoffs to Sales representatives 
Ensure prospects are properly positioned for deeper commercial and technical discussions 
Maintain accurate CRM records and feedback loops to improve marketing effectiveness 
Marketing Execution & Team Coordination 
Act as a senior, hands-on contributor across marketing initiatives - content, campaigns, events, digital, and sales enablement 
Provide project management and coordination across the marketing team to keep initiatives moving and aligned 
Bring full-stack marketing skills to augment teammates’ work, filling gaps where needed to maintain momentum and quality 
10+ years of experience in B2B marketing, demand generation, or presales roles (SaaS preferred) 
Proven ability to personally generate meetings and pipeline 
Comfort leading early customer conversations and delivering high-level product demonstrations 
Strong organizational and project management skills with a bias toward execution 
Experience working closely with Sales in a revenue-driven environment 
Clear communicator who can balance strategic thinking with hands-on delivery 
Why This Role Is Different 
Direct impact on revenue - not removed from it 
High visibility across Marketing, Sales, and Leadership 
Opportunity to shape how UpClear brings its story to market as it scales 
Autonomy, trust, and ownership in a profitable, independent company 
Be part of a growing global SaaS company, with offices in NYC, London, Paris, Singapore
Work on latest Cloud technology and build architecture for fast-growing Tech
Weekly happy hours, good office culture, global cross team collaboration, direct access to executive leadership for guidance.
Various Health Care Plans you can choose from to best fits your needs (Medical, Dental & Vision) 
Retirement Plan with company match (401k, IRA) 
Generous Paid Time Off package that grows with seniority (Vacation, Sick, and Public Holidays) 
Paid Maternity leave 
Paid Parental bonding leave 
One month paid sabbatical after five continuous years of work at Upclear 
Compensation: $140-160K
The salary range listed is a good faith determination of potential base compensation that may be offered to a successful applicant for this position at the time of this job advertisement and may be modified in the future. When determining a team member's base salary several factors may be considered as applicable including, but not limited to, relevant education, qualifications, certifications, experience, skills, seniority.
ai_remote_location: New York, New York, United States
ai_core_responsibilities: The Senior Manager, Marketing will drive early demand and qualify inbound interest while ensuring a clean handoff to Sales. This role also involves coordinating marketing initiatives and strengthening team execution.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 10+ years of experience in B2B marketing, demand generation, or presales roles, preferably in SaaS. Strong organizational skills and the ability to generate meetings and pipeline are essential.
linkedin_org_slogan: Revenue Management software for Consumer Goods brands.
linkedin_org_locations: 150 W 22nd St., 6th Floor, New York, New York 10011, US
239 Kensington High Street, Kensington, England W8 6SN, GB
39 rue d'Aboukir, Paris, Île-de-France 75002, FR
31 Boon Tat Street, #02-01, Singapore, 069625, SG
linkedin_org_description:
At UpClear, our mission is to empower Consumer Goods brands to maximize revenue performance and trade investment returns through intelligent, collaborative software—providing a single source of truth, streamlined automation, and actionable insights.

BluePlanner Revenue Management software supports end-to-end processes from Annual Operating Planning to Account Planning and Execution.
It is used by brands globally at various stages of growth. Client partners include Beyond Meat, Blue Buffalo, Blue Diamond Growers, Community Coffee, Coty, Danone, Ferrero, Godiva, Jelly Belly, Hovis, King Arthur Baking Company, King’s Hawaiian, Kodiak Cakes, KP Snacks, Kraft-Heinz, LALA, Martinelli's, Nissin, Perfetti Van Melle, Reckitt Benckiser, Spindrift, Twinings, Vita Coco, Warburtons and Yoplait.

UpClear services its clients with teams in New York, London, Paris and Singapore.

title: Construction Cost Estimator - Federal Sector
description_text:
Procon is a top-ranked construction management and technology consulting firm with 25 years of experience delivering high‑impact projects across the U.S. and worldwide. An ENR Top 100 CM/PM firm for five consecutive years, we specialize in program management, project controls, commissioning, and technology—and offer an excellent platform to grow your career while shaping the future of the built environment.
Procon now seeks a Construction Cost Estimator for a long term opportunity in Arlington, VA. This role requires various skills and experience as listed below.
Qualifications and Skills
Bachelor’s degree in Construction Management, Engineering, or related field.
Minimum of 3 years of experience in construction estimation.
Experience supporting vertical construction, utility, and/or infrastructure projects.
Familiarity with complex program environments, including development/review of Integrated Master Schedules and analysis of TIAs/COs.
Strong verbal and written communication skills for stakeholder engagement and reporting.
Estimating proficiency using multiple structures and formats: UNIFORMAT and CSI divisions.
Working knowledge of cost databases such as RSMeans.
Ability to pass an HSPD-12 background check.
ASPE (American Society of Professional Estimators) or AACE International certification (e.g., CCP, CEP) certification preferred.
Experience on federal facilities programs and large, multi-phase projects.
Responsibilities and Duties 
Prepare conceptual, schematic, design development, and construction-level estimates with clear bases of estimate and documented assumptions.
Perform change order pricing and evaluate contractor proposals, including detailed analysis of cost build-ups and schedule impacts.
Develop Rough Order of Magnitude (ROM) estimates to support planning for construction projects, A/E studies, and maintenance work.
Conduct market research (labor, materials, equipment) and integrate findings into unit prices, assemblies, and escalation.
Establish scope for bidding and estimating; draft clarifications and RFIs to ensure comprehensive subcontractor/vendor coverage.
Produce accurate quantity takeoffs and material pricing from drawings and specifications.
Track planned vs. actual cost and time performance; identify variances and recommend corrective actions.
Collaborate with schedulers to assess Time Impact Analyses (TIAs) and Change Orders (COs) within Integrated Master Schedules (IMS).
Communicate estimate methodology, risks, and deltas through clear written reports and stakeholder presentations.
Software Required
On-Screen Takeoff (OST)
Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook)
Preferred
MII (MCACES)
SUCCESS Estimator
GSA Cost Estimating Workbook
Salary commensurate with experience.
Interested and qualified candidates please submit a cover letter and a resume.
Procon offers competitive salaries and a comprehensive benefits package, including full medical/dental insurance and 401(K) plan. Procon is an equal opportunity employer and considers qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, gender, age, color, religion, disability, veteran status, sexual orientation, or any other protected factor
ai_core_responsibilities: Prepare various levels of construction estimates and perform change order pricing. Collaborate with stakeholders to assess impacts and communicate findings effectively.
ai_requirements_summary: A bachelor's degree in a related field and a minimum of 3 years of experience in construction estimation are required. Familiarity with federal facilities programs and strong communication skills are also essential.
linkedin_org_slogan: Procon is the nation's leading professional services firm for innovation in construction.
linkedin_org_locations: 1800 Tysons Blvd, Suite 620, McLean, Virginia 22102, US
linkedin_org_description:
Procon Consulting is a top-ranked construction management and technology consulting firm headquartered in the Washington D.C. area. For 25 years, we’ve led high-impact projects across 46 states and around the globe for government and commercial clients.

As an ENR Top 100 CM/PM firm five years running, our expertise spans program management, project controls, commissioning, BIM, and 3D digital twins. We combine cutting-edge technology with a commitment to preserving the past and building a resilient future. Our podcast, The Build Up, invites like-minded leaders to share bold ideas that inspire innovation in the AEC industry.

Driven by our core values—service, excellence, integrity, and teamwork—Procon is shaping the future of the built environment.

title: Embedded Software Engineer, EMS
description_text:
Job Summary 
The Embedded Software Engineer reports to the EMS Software Manager and will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining embedded firmware system logic within the company’s energy storage systems (ESS) for battery management, power conversion systems, and more. This includes working with internal and external stakeholders to understand and refine implementations of the layer 2 and layer 3 Battery Management Systems (BMS) for the ESS systems. It is essential that decisions be made to ensure safety, quality, reliability, and maintainability of such implementations. Provide expertise and support to services, project execution, and application engineering team. Develop and deploy product and application documentation and assist in the benchmarking and evaluation of new technologies, solutions, or suppliers for integration into our offering. This position will specifically focus on Utility scale energy storage solutions with the integration of batteries, inverters, and balance of plant equipment required in a battery power plant.
Essential duties and responsibilities are included, but are not limited to the following: 
• Develop, implement, and maintain C and C++ code for next-gen BMS and power conversion systems. 
• Interface with Hardware Engineers, EMS Applications Engineers, and EMS Controls Engineers to integrate with battery management and power system management logic for safe and reliable management and control. 
• Document interfaces and logic. 
• Develop tools to automate firmware updates for production fleet systems. 
• Maintain C and C++ code for HD5 product line operation and optimization 
• Maintain knowledge of applicable codes, standards, certifications, and applications in the Energy Storage industry. 
• Assist with driving towards IEC standards and UL certifications. 
• Assist Operations Production Support team when BMS related issues arise. 
Knowledge, Skills, & Abilities 
To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. Reasonable accommodation may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions. 
Knowledge 
o 2-10 years prior experience writing embedded software for energy management systems such as ESS, Power Conversion Systems, or EVs 
o 2-10 years prior experience writing C and or C++ o 1-2 years prior experience with CANBUS o 2-10 years prior experience with Linux OS 
o Prior experience with SDLC (Software Development Life Cycle), Build Pipelines, and source code management is a plus 
o Prior experience with embedded firmware on PCB (Printed Circuit Boards) and 
Field-programmable Gate Array (FPGA) assembly is a plus 
o Prior experience with IEC standards and UL certification is a plus 
o Industry knowledge of BESS (Battery Energy Storage Systems), Inverters, 
Controllers/SCADA is a plus 
o NERC CIP knowledge is a plus 
Skills 
o Core skills needed: C++, C, LinuxOS, CANBUS, IEC61131 ST, Power / Energy management systems knowledge, BitBucket 
o Other preferable skills: gtest, Unity, Ceedling, HIL testing, Arm / bare-metal C, MS Office Excel, MS Windows, Python, RTU & TCP MODBUS, Git, Azure 
Abilities 
o Communicate effectively with staff and management at all levels. 
o Always maintain the highest degree of honesty and integrity. 
o Lead proactive team efforts to achieve departmental and company goals. 
o Ability to work under time pressure and adapt to changing requirements with a positive attitude. 
o Protect confidential information by not communicating, disclosing to, or using it for benefit of 3rd parties. Intellectual Property protection of the EMS Platform is of utmost importance. 
o Comply with all EHS policies, practices and procedures reporting all unsafe activities to Management and/or Human Resources. 
o Work in the global environment to maintain standards and latest practices. 
o Ability to work closely with and influence cross-functional teams.
o Good project management skills to lead initiatives to completion. 
o Highly competitive, self-starter that can work both individually and in a group setting. 
o Ability to work flexible hours and be independent in the field
Education & Job Experience 
• Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or Computer Science with a minimum of two (2) years of related experience in the field. 
• Experience with Electric Vehicles Renewables projects involving Battery Energy Storage Systems is considered an asset. 
• Experience with reading and understanding project drawings, equipment installation, system start-up and commissioning procedures, and technical documents. 
Physical Requirements & Work Environment 
The physical demands and work environment characteristics described herein are representative of those that must be met by an employee to successfully perform the essential functions of this job. Reasonable accommodation may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions. 
• Ability to travel up to 15% of the time, including international travel, to deploy and commission the EMS OS Platform. 
• Regularly required to stand and walk. Frequently lift and/or move up to 25 pounds. 
• Occasionally lift and/or move up to 50 pounds. 
• The noise level in the work environment is usually moderate to loud. 
Hearing protection may be recommended and/or required in some work locations. 
• The office is conveniently located near Orlando International Airport (MCO), modern floor plan with a Diagnostics Operations Center (DOC) and SCADA provisioning room embedded in the design. This role would be either Remote or Hybrid (2-3 days a week) in the office, depending on the situation.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Embedded Software Engineer will design, develop, and maintain embedded firmware for energy storage systems, focusing on battery management and power conversion systems. This role involves collaborating with various engineering teams to ensure safe and reliable system implementations.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 2-10 years of experience in embedded software development, particularly with energy management systems, and proficiency in C and C++. Familiarity with CANBUS, Linux OS, and relevant industry standards is also required.
linkedin_org_locations: 1305 Lakes Pkwy, Suite 112, Lawrenceville, GA 30043, US
linkedin_org_description:
IS International Services, LLC (IS) is a controls system integrator, providing solutions and services globally.   

On the engineering front we provide control system hardware, software design, along with I&C and electrical design services on a T&M or fixed price structure. We specialize in PLC programming with expertise in over 15 different PLC platforms. Our process experience ranges from power generation, power transmission, factory automation, to oil and gas process automation. Our low overhead structure allows us to deliver top notch engineering at very competitive price points.

In addition to project engineering execution we can provide personnel via statement of work, with a focus specialization on high-end engineers. Our model is different from other companies in that our account managers and executive management are all engineers. We have PMP certified project managers as well to support your business. This unique structure allows us to augment your business with our engineering personnel without your company having to increase full-time headcount.

title: 55624150807 - Senior Manager, Public Relations (Consumer)
description_text:
Job Title: Senior Manager, Public Relations (Consumer)
Type: Full-time; Remote
Schedule: US Timezone
Job Description:
We are seeking a Senior Manager, Public Relations (Consumer) to drive exceptional earned media attention that supports our growing brand portfolio. As the Senior Manager, Public Relations you will develop and execute consumer-driven PR strategies, craft and tell inspired stories, maintain strong media relationships and garner favorable media coverage for our brands, products and initiatives. This position will work within the Brand Marketing organization to maintain our industry-leading levels of brand awareness, brand affinity, and reputation. 
You will...
-Drive the development and execution of brand and product storytelling to generate positive earned media coverage and conversation across all HelloFresh brands.
-Play a critical role in shaping upstream and strategic communications to drive business.
-Partner with internal stakeholders across the organization to identify news within the walls of HelloFresh, leveraging brand content, data, and in-house experts to secure a broader earned footprint.
-Plan and execute disruptive PR programs, brand-led partnerships, product launches, sustainability initiatives, and seasonal campaigns.
-Build and foster relationships with members of the media -- conduct research to constantly build a rolodex of relevant contacts and outlets. 
-Help oversee measurement, campaign efficacy, and budget. 
You are...
-A critical thinker—Use logic and reasoning to identify the strengths and weaknesses of alternative solutions, conclusions or approaches to problems.
-A strategic business partner – working to proactively design communication plans that support business development and growth.
-A team player with a fantastic can-do attitude ("no" isn't in your vocabulary!).
-Driven for Results— Push projects to completion with a sense of urgency. Focus on activities that have tangible business outcomes.
-A clear communicator—with excellent written and oral communications skills. Able to clearly coordinate and provide information to co-workers.
-Egoless—you’re never hesitant to roll-up your sleeves. 
-Boundlessly creative—you’re always on the lookout for creating the next story idea or opportunity. You also apply your creativity to your problem-solving abilities.
At a minimum, you have...
Undergraduate degree in Communications, Marketing or related field
7+ years experience in a PR/Communications role (agency experience a plus)
Strong written and verbal communication skills
An avid news junkie who keeps up with trends both in and outside of the food/tech industries
Experience with brand performance tracking
A true go-getter. You’re proactive and always think two steps ahead
Excited to work in a fast-paced environment with constant change.
Experience with media monitoring and database tools (Muck Rack, Talkwalker, TVEyes etc.) 
Experience working with food and lifestyle brands. Experience working with D2C brands and/or subscription brands a plus. 
A passion for food!
ai_core_responsibilities: The Senior Manager, Public Relations will develop and execute consumer-driven PR strategies to generate positive media coverage for HelloFresh brands. This role involves maintaining strong media relationships and collaborating with internal stakeholders to identify newsworthy content.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have an undergraduate degree in Communications, Marketing, or a related field, along with 7+ years of experience in a PR/Communications role. Strong communication skills and a proactive attitude are essential, along with experience in media monitoring and working with food and lifestyle brands.

-Boundlessly creative—you’re always on the lookout for creating the next story idea or opportunity. You also apply your creativity to your problem-solving abilities.
At a minimum, you have...
Undergraduate degree in Communications, Marketing or related field
7+ years experience in a PR/Communications role (agency experience a plus)
Strong written and verbal communication skills
An avid news junkie who keeps up with trends both in and outside of the food/tech industries
Experience with brand performance tracking
A true go-getter. You’re proactive and always think two steps ahead
Excited to work in a fast-paced environment with constant change.
Experience with media monitoring and database tools (Muck Rack, Talkwalker, TVEyes etc.) 
Experience working with food and lifestyle brands. Experience working with D2C brands and/or subscription brands a plus. 
A passion for food!

title: Junior Power Market Data & Research Analyst
locations_alt_raw: São Paulo, State of São Paulo, Brazil
description_text:
The Opportunity 
Rystad Energy is seeking an ambitious and motivated candidate with a strong academic record of accomplishment, an analytical mindset, with excellent data and communication skills, and interested in power markets, renewables technologies and energy transition.
The Renewables and Power team is part of the analysis department in Rystad Energy and is responsible for maintaining and developing our database and products within the sector. Your role will consist of researching the major power markets across Latin America to support the development of our regional products. You will be joining a lean and collaborative team, in a very dynamic environment, interacting with analysts from different teams across the world and with local and global clients.
Responsibilities
· Research into the major Latin America power markets, including regulation framework and pricing mechanisms
· Track changes in policies and their key implications for the forecast models
· Develop and maintain automated data scrapers to collect power market data across the region
· Develop, update and manage the regional power databases in Excel and SQL
· Support the development and management of dashboards in Power BI
· Track power auctions results and technology trends
· Support the development of customized analysis and market reports
· Support the development of presentations for client meetings, conferences and webinars
Requirements
· Academic background in engineering, economics or computer science
· 1-3 years in the power market space
· Strong verbal and written communication skills in English.
· Proficient in Excel (basic formulas, pivot tables, ability to structure large spreadsheets), PowerPoint and Power BI
· Strong programming skills in Python
· Basic knowledge of SQL, including database structure and queries
· Solid analytical and problem-solving skills 
· Team player, fast learner and interested in energy-related topics
What We Offer
- A global and quickly expanding international business culture
- A diverse, dynamic, and highly skilled working environment
- Development opportunities internationally
- Competitive compensation package and bonus plan
About Rystad Energy
Headquartered in Oslo, Norway, and with offices across the globe, Rystad Energy is independent Energy research and business intelligence company providing data, tools, analytics, and consultancy services to clients exposed to the energy industry across the globe.
Rystad Energy has a range of global databases and research products for companies in the Oil & Gas, Oilfield Services, and Renewables sectors, as well as Investors, Investment Banks and Governments. We also provide a range of advisory services for our clients with capabilities across the Energy value chain.
Rystad Energy is a rapidly growing company providing the next generation analytical tools and advice for the industry. Rystad Energy combines a high-performance culture with a deeply collaborative ethos, providing ample opportunities for growth, learning, contribution, and career advancement. Read more at www.rystadenergy.com.
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves researching major power markets in Latin America and supporting the development of regional products. Responsibilities include tracking policy changes, managing databases, and developing market reports.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have an academic background in engineering, economics, or computer science, along with 1-3 years of experience in the power market space. Strong communication skills in English and proficiency in Excel, Power BI, and Python are required.
linkedin_org_locations: Fjordalléen 16, Oslo, Oslo 0250, NO
linkedin_org_description:
Rystad Energy is an independent research and intelligence company, dedicated to equipping clients with data, insights and education that power better decision-making.
 
Energy is the lifeblood of our company. Our bottom-up approach starts at the most granular level: we put the pieces together to make sense of the whole picture, create visions for the future and empower the decisions to get there. Our expertise spans energy, climate and the economy, including oil and gas, geopolitics, renewables and clean technologies, supply chains, power markets, and macroeconomics.
 
Founded in 2004 and headquartered in Oslo, Norway, we’ve grown to nearly 900 professionals across 31 global offices. Through a foundation of trust, respect and deep expertise, we deliver customer-focused intelligence, advisory services and ongoing support that helps global decision-makers navigate today’s dynamic markets.

title: 🥥Marketing and Ops Specialist - Job Code: 53896298276
description_text:
At Coconut 🥥, we connect founders and businesses with top-tier remote talent while prioritizing meaningful, reliable partnerships. We believe success happens when everyone wins. Clients achieve their goals, and our virtual professionals find purpose and growth in their work. We're currently looking for top talent to fill the role below:

Role: Marketing and Ops Specialist
Monthly Rate: $1000
Availability: Part-time - 20 hours/week
Time Zone: MST business hours
==================================================
To streamline your application, please carefully review and complete ALL THREE items below before proceeding to the application form.
What to Prepare:
1️⃣ English Proficiency Rating – You will need to enter your CEFR English proficiency level in the application form. If you’re unsure of your rating, you can take a quick assessment here: EF SET Quick Check.
2️⃣ Coconut VA Profile (Resume) – Before submitting your application, please create your Coconut VA profile using this template: Coconut VA Profile Template. ⚠️⚠️⚠️ YOUR RESUME MUST FOLLOW THIS FORMAT AND SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH. This is a test of how keen you are with details and how well you follow instructions. ⚠️⚠️⚠️
3️⃣ 1-Minute Introduction Video – Record a short introduction video (preferably using Loom) and provide the link in your application. Before you do, check out these video tips and sample videos. Important: By submitting your video, you grant Coconut permission to share it on our platforms to help increase your chances of being matched with a client. Videos with broken or dummy links will result in disqualification.
Experience Needed/Responsibilities:
Marketing & Content (Primary Focus): Manage and optimize HubSpot for both CRM and email marketing (database organization, tagging, lists, campaigns).
-Set up, schedule, and manage a consistent LinkedIn content calendar.
-Set up, schedule, and manage Instagram content for the agency; optimize posts for reach and growth.
-Create and execute a monthly newsletter strategy (primarily via HubSpot): topics, structure, copy support, deployment.
-Troubleshoot and own HubSpot newsletter limitations (plan limits, segmenting sends, understanding current subscription or plan).
-Mine the client's extensive photo and video content and turn into regular LinkedIn posts, Instagram posts and stories, and throwback style posts to resurface strong older content.
-Repurpose testimonials and case studies from the website into marketing assets (drip campaigns, social proof posts, etc.).
-Help build visible proof of Meritage’s work online so people clearly understand what the company does.
-LinkedIn & Audience Growth: Develop a strategy to farm and re activate Doug’s existing LinkedIn network (DM campaigns, reconnection messages, etc.).
-Explore ways to convert LinkedIn contacts into newsletter subscribers and vice versa.
-Research and apply best practices for LinkedIn reach (hashtags, posting cadence, content angles, tagging, etc.).
-Study examples such as Melissa Henault’s LinkedIn focused strategy and adapt concepts for Doug’s business.
-Social Media Growth & Optimization: Improve growth and engagement on Instagram (company account and potentially Doug’s personal account)
-Use basic SEO, social, and hashtag tactics to increase visibility of LinkedIn and Instagram content.
-Suggest content ideas and micro campaigns tied to events Doug is participating in (Santa Barbara panel, major festivals, celebrity events, etc.).
-HubSpot & CRM Organization: Clean up and structure the HubSpot database with a focus on brands and brand marketers who run live events or experiential campaigns, as well as talent, production partners, and vendors.
-Set up a simple and usable tagging and bucketing system (brand, talent, production, vendor, etc.).
-Make it easy for Doug to quickly add contacts from his phone or business cards and look people up on the fly.
--Support strategies to generate more RFPs and new brand relationships instead of relying solely on existing clients.
-Help respond to RFPs through organization, formatting, pulling assets and testimonials, and light copy assistance.
-Brainstorm and propose outreach ideas and campaigns that could realistically generate new deals.
-AI & Automation (Nice to Have): Identify ways to use AI and automation to save time beyond simple copy improvements.
-Research and test tools (such as Replit or similar platforms) to automate repetitive tasks like screening, list building, or simple workflows.
-Proactively bring new tools and ideas to Doug and pilot them with clear use cases.
-General Admin & Operations (Secondary or Fill In Work): Support admin tasks that make Doug and the producers (Lauren in LA and Kaylin in Denver) more efficient.
-Conduct research such as identifying music festivals by state, vendors, or relevant opportunities for clients.
-Build and maintain light processes, lists, and dashboards using Excel or similar tools.
-Provide occasional coordination or support for producers on event related tasks.
Good to have:
-Background in entertainment, live events, experiential marketing, brands, apparel, or similar consumer focused industries.
-Business development or sales experience with comfort thinking about pipeline and deal generation.
-Experience using AI tools or automation platforms to streamline workflows.
Non-negotiable Requirements:
-Strong HubSpot experience with the ability to set it up correctly and teach Doug how to use it.
-Prior marketing experience rather than pure admin, ideally in agencies, brands, events, entertainment, or similar spaces.
-SEO and social media knowledge for LinkedIn and Instagram including optimization, growth strategies, and hashtags.
-A marketing strategy mindset with comfort handling admin as needed (marketing with admin rather than admin with a little marketing).
-Resourceful, proactive, idea generating personality who is comfortable taking initiative.
-Comfortable managing up and confidently guiding Doug on marketing priorities and decisions.
Industry/Tools Experience:
-HubSpot (CRM and marketing email) critical.
-LinkedIn.
-Instagram.
-Basic AI tools such as ChatGPT and openness to tools like Replit or automation platforms.
-Excel or Google Sheets and similar list or dashboard tools.
We’re all about uplifting lives in Coconut and we make sure we provide benefits that support work-life balance, well-being, and growth. Here’s what you can look forward to as part of the Coconut Community! ✨
✅ Competitive Salary – We recognize your skills and experience with a great compensation package.
✅ 13th Month Pay – Enjoy an extra month’s salary—because who doesn’t love a little bonus?
✅ Paid Time Off – Recharge with 12 days of PTO to use however you like—vacation, self-care, or just a break from it all!
✅ US Holidays Off – Enjoy 12 paid US holidays throughout the year.
✅ Maternity & Paternity Leave – We support growing families with dedicated leave for new parents.
✅ Comprehensive Healthcare – We’ve got you and your family covered with quality healthcare benefits.
✅ Life Insurance* – Our full-time HMO plan includes life insurance for extra peace of mind.
✅ Mental Health Support – Prioritize your well-being with access to mental health consultations and wellness resources.
✅ Milestone Gifts & Birthday Treats – We celebrate your achievements and make your special day even better!
✅ Exciting Team Experiences – Think island getaways, virtual town halls, and regional meetups—because work should be fun, too!
✅ Stay Connected – Be part of a supportive network where you can learn, grow, and connect with amazing people.
Some benefits may vary. Full details will be provided during the onboarding process.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Marketing and Ops Specialist will manage and optimize HubSpot for CRM and email marketing, as well as develop and execute content strategies for LinkedIn and Instagram. They will also support admin tasks and help generate new brand relationships through outreach campaigns.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have strong HubSpot experience and prior marketing experience, ideally in related fields such as agencies or events. A proactive and resourceful personality is essential, along with knowledge of SEO and social media strategies.

title: Talent Sourcer - Video Games (12 month contract)
description_text:
Summary:
Are you a talented and proactive sourcer with a passion for games? We are seeking a Talent Sourcer to join our team on a 12-month contract. This role will partner closely with multiple North American studios and your role will involve identifying, attracting, and engaging top-tier talent to bring AAA franchises to life. If you're driven by working with outstanding candidates and contributing to our growth, read on! 
Responsibilities: 
Candidate Sourcing: Use cutting-edge techniques and tools to uncover hidden talent within the video game industry. Engage and build relationships with potential candidates. 
Candidate Review: Review and assess the active applicant pool to identify qualified candidates, conduct initial resume screenings, and surface top talent to recruiters and hiring managers for next-stage consideration.
Collaborative Recruiting: Partner closely with internal recruiters to understand hiring needs and co-create effective strategies. Share market insights to enhance hiring decisions. 
Engaging Top Talent: Showcase our culture, projects, and growth potential to inspire exceptional professionals. Foster meaningful connections with candidates throughout their journey. 
Screening and Evaluation: Conduct thorough assessments of candidates, evaluating skills, qualifications, and cultural fit. Deliver comprehensive summaries and recommendations. 
Brand Ambassadorship: Embody our brand, generating excitement and attracting top talent. Provide an exceptional candidate experience. 
Data Management: Maintain accurate candidate data, generate insightful reports, and track sourcing effectiveness. 
Qualifications and Skills: 
1-2 years of experience as a Talent Acquisition Sourcer or similar role, in the video game industry or media/entertainment fields. 
Industry Knowledge: Strong understanding of the video game industry, market trends, roles, and skill sets. 
Sourcing Mastery: Command diverse techniques and tools, leveraging online platforms, social media, and professional networks. 
Relationship Building: Excellent interpersonal and communication skills to establish rapport and maintain strong connections. 
Results-Driven: Self-driven with a track record of achieving targets and delivering high-quality candidates. 
Adaptability: Thrive in a fast-paced, ever-changing environment. 
Confidentiality: Maintain professionalism and discretion with sensitive information. 
This is a 12-month contract (no benefits) 100% remote role with a salary range of 55,000 CAD to 70,000 CAD. At this time, we are only considering candidates located in ON, BC or QC Canada. 
Keywords Studios is dedicated to following a well-established Equal Opportunities Policy. We endeavor to create a workplace which provides for equal opportunities for all employees and potential employees.
PERSONAL DATA PROTECTION POLICY
By providing your information in this application, you understand that we will collect and process your information in accordance with our Applicant Privacy Notice. For more information, please see our Applicant Privacy Notice at https://www.keywordsstudios.com/en/applicant-privacy-notice.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Talent Sourcer will identify, attract, and engage top-tier talent for AAA franchises while collaborating with internal recruiters to understand hiring needs. They will also conduct candidate assessments and maintain accurate candidate data.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 1-2 years of experience in talent acquisition within the video game or media/entertainment fields. A strong understanding of the video game industry and excellent interpersonal skills are essential.

linkedin_org_description:
🎮🎬 We help make video games, films, and fan favourites you’ve probably played, watched, or heard.

We work behind the scenes with game developers, publishers, and entertainment companies to bring their ideas to life and keep them running smoothly. From game development and art production to audio services, localization, game testing, community support, and marketing, we’re the partner you call when you need extra hands (or brains).

We are 13,000 people worldwide. Tech-savvy, AI-aware, and deeply invested in R&D. We’re adaptable, collaborative, and used to plugging into diverse teams and pipelines. Many of us grew up with games, animation, and film. We’re fans first, and that shows in how we work: with care, respect, accessibility, and safety in mind.

Whether it’s building innovative experiences, meeting tight deadlines, or preserving creative vision across every language and culture, our services and proprietary tools integrate seamlessly with your team at any stage of the product life cycle.

We don’t always make the headlines, but we help others get there. 

Among our clients: Tencent Games, Microsoft, Ubisoft, Supercell, Bandai Namco, Netflix, Amazon... #ImagineMore

linkedin_org_description:
🎮🎬 We help make video games, films, and fan favourites you’ve probably played, watched, or heard.

We work behind the scenes with game developers, publishers, and entertainment companies to bring their ideas to life and keep them running smoothly. From game development and art production to audio services, localization, game testing, community support, and marketing, we’re the partner you call when you need extra hands (or brains).

We are 13,000 people worldwide. Tech-savvy, AI-aware, and deeply invested in R&D. We’re adaptable, collaborative, and used to plugging into diverse teams and pipelines. Many of us grew up with games, animation, and film. We’re fans first, and that shows in how we work: with care, respect, accessibility, and safety in mind.

Whether it’s building innovative experiences, meeting tight deadlines, or preserving creative vision across every language and culture, our services and proprietary tools integrate seamlessly with your team at any stage of the product life cycle.

We don’t always make the headlines, but we help others get there. 

Among our clients: Tencent Games, Microsoft, Ubisoft, Supercell, Bandai Namco, Netflix, Amazon... #ImagineMore

title: Licensed and Non-Licensed Therapist - Outpatient/School Based PRN
description_text:
The Bradley Center is excited to announce that our Outpatient Program is growing. 
We provide therapy as well as psychiatric and med management services to children, adults, and families. School-Based Mental Health Services are provided to students in several school districts in Allegheny and surrounding counties. 
We are looking for confident licensed and non-licensed clinicians who have the ability to assess, plan, and provide compassionate therapy to those we serve. Therapists manage their caseloads and function independently, while also collaborating with others in a team-based approach to treatment. All activities are in accordance with outpatient regulations, The Joint Commission standards, and trauma-informed treatment. 
Qualifications best suited for the position:
Strong interpersonal skills
Excellent verbal and written communication and listening skills
Ability to communicate with compassion and empathy
Ability to build rapport quickly
Effective listening, interpersonal, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills. 
Professional demeanor, sound judgment, dependability, and a strong work ethic
Detail oriented with a strong ability to manage time and prioritize tasks
Initiative
Primary Responsibilities:
Establish a positive, trusting rapport with clients
Diagnose and treat mental health disorders
Create individualized treatment plans according to client needs
Conduct ongoing assessments of client progress
Maintain thorough records and completes documentation in a timely manner
Master’s degree in a generally recognized clinical discipline, with a degree program that includes clinical practicum
NCC or LSW preferred
Experience diagnosing and providing therapy is preferred
Must be at least 21 years of age
Valid PA driver’s license or ability to obtain such license, with proof of auto insurance coverage
Additional Job Requirement for LICENSED Mental Health Therapist:
A valid PA counseling license, inclusive of LCSW, LMFT, LPC, or psychologist
Benefits for Full Time Employees:
Student loan repayment program (We contribute directly to employee's student loan lenders monthly)
$750 sign on bonus
$2000 relocation assistance
Referral bonuses
Generous Paid Time Off in the first year of full-time employment
Health, dental and vision Coverage
401(k)
Life insurance
Advanced training opportunities and continuing education credits
We are committed to advocacy for children with special needs, care and compassion, and focusing on the inherent strengths of children, youth and families without regard to race, religion, sexual orientation, national origin, age, or gender. The Bradley Center is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All applicants will be considered for employment without attention to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran or disability status.
ai_core_responsibilities: Establish a positive rapport with clients and diagnose and treat mental health disorders. Create individualized treatment plans and conduct ongoing assessments of client progress.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a Master's degree in a clinical discipline and experience in diagnosing and providing therapy is preferred. A valid PA counseling license is required for licensed therapists.
linkedin_org_locations: 5180 Campbells Run Raod, Pittsburgh, PA 15205, US
linkedin_org_description:
For over 100 years Bradley has been providing hope to children and families in need of comprehensive and caring services. 

Bradley was founded by The United Methodist Women in 1905 as The Elizabeth A. Bradley Home for Children and operated for many years as an orphanage and as interim housing for children whose parents were separated or divorced. In 1972, it was incorporated as The Bradley Center to serve abused, neglected and dependent children. 

In 1991, Bradley was reorganized by a new non-denominational, community-based Board of Trustees and executive management. 

The Bradley Center has since evolved into an accredited, regional behavioral healthcare and child welfare system that provides hope to young girls and boys. 

Bradley is committed to advocacy for children and dedicated to the restoration of productive relationships among children, their families and the community whenever possible. 

The Bradley Center implements the Sanctuary Model of Trauma Informed Care developed by Dr. Sandra Bloom. Sanctuary is a treatment and organizational model that is based on understanding trauma. Every staff and resident in care focus on "SELF"​ - Safety (physical, psychological, social and moral), Emotion management, Loss (traumatic experiences and separation), and the Future (how can things get better?). 

Bradley has earned the quality distinction of accreditation by the Joint Commission on Accreditation of Healthcare Organizations. It is also licensed by the Pennsylvania Departments of Education and Welfare. 

Bradley's Vision is to be recognized nationally by families, communities and professionals as a premier behavioral healthcare, education and child welfare organization that promotes the physical, social, emotional, educational and spiritual growth of the children, youth and families that it serves.

title: Customer Service Representative (CSR)
description_text:
Position: Customer Service Representative (CSR)
Company: Empower Brands
Location: Remote (Work from Home)
Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (EST-CST-PST
About the Role
Empower Brands is seeking a full-time Customer Service Representative to serve as the primary point of contact for customers. This role is critical in delivering an outstanding customer experience by addressing inquiries, resolving concerns, and ensuring satisfaction throughout the customer journey.
This is an excellent opportunity to join a growing organization committed to service excellence and customer care.
Key Responsibilities
Customer Support & Inquiry Handling
Respond to customer inquiries via phone, email, and text. 
Provide clear and accurate information about services, pricing, and next steps. 
Assist customers with service requests in a professional manner. 
Issue Resolution & Complaint Management
Handle customer complaints with empathy and professionalism. 
De-escalate situations and provide effective solutions. 
Escalate complex issues when necessary. 
Ticketing & Documentation
Create and update support tickets in the CRM. 
Document customer interactions and follow-up actions accurately. 
Maintain clear and updated customer records. 
Service Follow-Up & Satisfaction
Follow up with customers after service interactions. 
Support customer retention by ensuring positive service experiences. 
Internal Coordination
Communicate customer updates with internal teams. 
Support smooth service delivery and assist with administrative tasks as needed. 
Qualifications
Minimum 3 years of customer service experience (home services or related industries preferred). 
Strong verbal and written English communication skills. 
Ability to resolve customer issues calmly and efficiently. 
Experience using CRM platforms and customer support systems. 
Comfortable using VoIP systems such as RingCentral. 
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail. 
Ability to work independently in a remote environment. 
Professional and quiet remote work setup (PC) with reliable high-speed internet.
Strong Zoom presence and polished communication skills.
Ability to balance client interactions with administrative responsibilities.
Submission of an introductory video is required as part of the hiring process.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Customer Service Representative will respond to customer inquiries, resolve complaints, and ensure customer satisfaction. This role involves creating support tickets, documenting interactions, and coordinating with internal teams.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a minimum of 3 years of customer service experience, preferably in home services or related industries. Strong communication skills and the ability to work independently in a remote environment are essential.

title: Product Developer Apparel
description_text:
Reporting directly to the PD Manager, the Product Developer will be responsible for Design, researching, developing and launching new products for the Apparel lines.
He/she will be responsible for product development and planning throughout the product lifecycle, including gathering and prioritizing product requirements, working closely with the buying department and ensuring that revenue and customer satisfaction goals are met.
He/she will also ensure that the product is aligned with the strategy and goals of the business.
CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:
Oversee and manage product process in line with the business goals and objectives.
Maintain calendar to ensure that all sample deadlines are met
Research new styles and models to propose to buyers
Create specification sheets for all new products created
Manage quality control up to PPs of production and approve them
Fitting of prototypes
Coordinate creation and updating excel grid in term of coding, cost entering, time line inserting and quantity entering collected by the buying department
Check the lab-dip and the art-work of production with sizes developments
Work with product management team to ensure an efficient process
Participate in cross-functional teams to execute product development plan
Work in synergy with tech design and quality control offices
Realize and follow-up technical cards with suppliers
Communicate daily with factories for progress of samples and troubleshoot any product development issues
Negotiate costs with factories to meet targets and margin goals
Visit factories and resolve issues as required
Manage costs and referencing of styles
Meet locally specialized vendors
Attend fashion and textile shows
Provide SKU analysis as needed
Create style/colour/codes and data maintenance in Enovia
Fill BOMs in Enovia
At least 4 years of relevant work experience in the same role and field
Strong ability with Adobe (photoshop and Illustrator)
Strong knowledge of womenswear and menswear required, preferably Outlet division
Must prove to have a clear understanding of the Guess Brand DNA
Knowledge of and experience using conventional and unconventional fabrics and materials
Familiarity with vendor management and negotiation
Must have excellent organizational skills with attention to detail and follow-up
Excellent interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact with a diverse group at all level
Problem solving and negotiating skills
Flexible in ever-changing, fast paced environment
Deadline driven with a track record of delivering excellent results on time
Extensive computer experience including but not limited to Microsoft: Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Model Form, Enovia
Fluent English. Any additional language is considered a plus
Ability to travel to all countries within the designated regions as required
Be part of a very progressive global company which is performing extremely well and has an exceptional growth trajectory in a tough market taking in consideration the sustainability in the business running.
An International, fresh and dynamic working environment 
Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
Training & Development platform and paths 
Discount on our products both online and in stores
Don’t miss your chance to join a progressive and sustainable global company, which is constantly looking for new challenges and opportunities to grow in a competitive and tough market.
Guess promotes a people-first workspace, where their well-being and their development are part of the history and the success of the brand.
Do you think we’re a good match for you? Apply now to be part of our family!
ai_core_responsibilities: The Product Developer will oversee and manage the product process in line with business goals, ensuring that all sample deadlines are met and that products align with the company's strategy. They will also coordinate with various teams and manage quality control throughout the product lifecycle.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have at least 4 years of relevant experience in product development, with strong skills in Adobe software and a solid understanding of both womenswear and menswear. Excellent organizational and communication skills are essential, along with the ability to negotiate and manage vendor relationships.
linkedin_org_locations: Strada Regina 44, Bioggio, 6934, CH
linkedin_org_description:
Established in 1981, GUESS began as a jeans company and has since successfully grown into a global lifestyle brand.  Guess?, Inc. designs, markets, distributes, and licenses a lifestyle collection of contemporary apparel, denim, handbags, watches, eyewear, footwear, and other related consumer products. Guess? products are distributed through branded Guess? stores as well as better department and specialty stores around the world. 
As of January 30, 2021, the Company directly operated 1,046 retail stores in the Americas, Europe, and Asia. 
The Company’s partners and distributors operated 524 additional retail stores worldwide. 
As of January 30, 2021, the Company and its partners and distributors operated in approximately 100 countries worldwide. 

For more information about the Company, please visit www.guess.com.

title: Stage - Chargé de Mission Partenariats & Business Development (H/F)
description_text:
Withings est un leader dans la révolution de la santé connectée, transformant la manière dont les individus prennent en charge leur santé grâce à des produits innovants. En collaborant avec des institutions de santé et de recherche prestigieuses à l’échelle mondiale, Withings cherche à promouvoir de nouveaux modèles de prévention et de soins. Notre mission est d’offrir des solutions pour répondre aux défis actuels des systèmes de santé, tout en rendant la santé accessible et connectée à tous.
Dans ce rôle stratégique, vous serez au cœur du développement des partenariats B2C et de l'expansion de l'entreprise. Vous aurez la responsabilité de collaborer avec les équipes internes et externes pour soutenir la croissance de Withings à travers des partenariats stratégiques B2C, des initiatives commerciales et des opportunités d’expansion à l’international. Vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec le VP des Partenariats Stratégiques pour élaborer et mettre en œuvre la stratégie de développement commercial de l’entreprise, avec un focus particulier sur les partenariats consommateurs et l’extension de la marque auprès de nouveaux segments de marché.
En tant que Chargé(e) de Mission partenariats et Business Development, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans l’identification de nouvelles opportunités de collaboration B2C, la gestion de relations stratégiques et l’expansion de la présence de Withings auprès des consommateurs. Vous serez également chargé(e) de renforcer l'influence de Withings au sein de l'écosystème de la santé connectée et des industries adjacentes.
Objectifs principaux :
Identifier et développer des partenariats stratégiques B2C pour soutenir la croissance de Withings.
Contribuer à l'élargissement du réseau d’influence de l’entreprise dans les segments grand public, notamment dans la santé connectée et le bien-être.
Soutenir l'expansion de l'entreprise à l’international en identifiant et établissant des relations avec des partenaires clés du marché B2C.
Principales missions :
Développement des Partenariats B2C :
Identifier, établir et gérer des partenariats stratégiques avec des entreprises grand public, des acteurs de la distribution en ligne, des entreprises de bien-être, des influenceurs et des plateformes numériques.
Participer à la négociation et à la mise en place d’accords de collaboration 
Travailler sur des stratégies de fidélisation et d'engagement des consommateurs par des partenariats commerciaux.
Veille et Analyse de Marché :
Suivre l’évolution des tendances du marché B2C dans la santé et le bien-être connectés, identifier les nouveaux besoins consommateurs et anticiper les évolutions du secteur.
Analyser la concurrence et les opportunités de développement B2C pour Withings, proposer des initiatives en fonction des évolutions stratégiques de l’entreprise et des besoins du marché.
Collaboration Interne :
Travailler étroitement avec les équipes internes (marketing, innovation produit, CRM, etc.) pour aligner les actions de développement commercial et les stratégies de partenariat avec les objectifs B2C.
Coordonner les actions de marketing et de communication liées aux partenariats B2C pour maximiser leur impact.
Développement des Relations Stratégiques B2C :
Identifier des partenaires potentiels dans les secteurs du retail, du fitness, du bien-être, de la santé numérique, etc., pour créer des opportunités de distribution et de co-marketing.
Participer à des événements, salons, conférences, et autres rencontres stratégiques afin de renforcer la visibilité de Withings auprès des consommateurs et de maximiser son empreinte dans le secteur grand public.
Support au VP des Partenariats Stratégiques :
Agir en tant que bras droit du VP des Partenariats Stratégiques pour le suivi des projets stratégiques B2C et des initiatives liées aux partenariats commerciaux.
Assurer la coordination des priorités internes et externes dans le cadre des partenariats B2C et contribuer à la mise en œuvre de la stratégie globale de l’entreprise.
De formation Bac+5 type grande école d’ingénieur/école de commerce, vous avez une première expérience réussie en stage en développement produit ou développement commercial idéalement dans une startup. 
Vous êtes proactif(ve), curieux(se), et capable de travailler de manière autonome
Vous êtes dôté d'un excellent sens de la communication, aussi bien en français et en anglais
Vous avez une solide compréhension des dynamiques du marché B2C, notamment dans les secteurs de la santé connectée, du bien-être, et des technologies pour le grand public.
Vous êtes capable de développer et de gérer des partenariats commerciaux complexes, de coordonner des projets et d’élaborer des stratégies de croissance sur le long terme.
Une expérience dans le business development B2C, les partenariats, ou la gestion de projets avec une forte composante grand public est un plus.
Rejoindre l’aventure Withings, c’est :
Intégrer un des pionniers et leaders mondiaux de la santé connectée, plusieurs fois primé au Consumer Electronic Show
Contribuer à des projets innovants et ambitieux pour la santé de demain dans un environnement agile et en constante évolution
Intégrer une entreprise internationale, membre de la FrenchTech 120, dont les équipes sont basées à Issy-les-Moulineaux, Boston, Hong-Kong et Shenzhen
Participer à l’amélioration continue de nos produits et services en les bêta-testant avant leur sortie, notamment lors de nos nombreuses sessions sportives entre collègues
Bénéficier de nombreux avantages : Stock Options, smartphone et ordinateur de votre choix, réductions pour des activités culturelles et sportives, restaurant d’entreprise, et bien plus encore
Collaborer avec des collègues passionnés et célébrer ensemble chacune de nos réussites !

Toutes les candidatures reçues sont étudiées indépendamment de l’origine ethnique, des opinions, des croyances, de la religion, du genre, de l’orientation sexuelle ou de la santé des candidats. Withings aspire à offrir et garantir l’égalité des chances aux candidats et seules les personnes habilitées (RH et Management) auront accès aux informations concernant votre candidature.
ai_benefits: Smartphone and Computer of Your Choice
Discounts for Cultural and Sports Activities
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves identifying and developing B2C partnerships to support Withings' growth and collaborating with internal and external teams to implement business development strategies. You will also manage strategic relationships and expand the company's presence in the consumer market.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a Bac+5 education in engineering or business school and a successful internship experience in product development or business development, preferably in a startup. Strong communication skills in French and English, along with a solid understanding of B2C market dynamics, particularly in connected health and wellness, are essential.
linkedin_org_slogan: Create technology that people love, to make better health part of daily life.
linkedin_org_locations: 2, Rue Maurice Hartmann, Issy-les-Moulineaux, Ile-de-France 92130, FR
linkedin_org_description: Withings created the first smart scale in 2009, and has been the pioneer in connected health ever since. Its clinically validated and multi-award winning range is used by millions worldwide, and includes smart scales, hybrid watches, blood pressure monitors, sleep analyzers and more. The team of engineers, data scientists, and healthcare professionals at Withings work alongside clinical experts to make it possible to take medical-grade measurements at home. Withings was the first to bring measurements for pulse wave velocity and electrodermal activity into the home – finding ever more precise ways to measure our health. Each device is designed to fit beautifully into daily life, supported by an app that unlocks long-term health insights and offers programs to create meaningful change. At Withings we’re dedicated to creating a world where people can see their path to better health, and feel supported to pursue it. Find out more at withings.com and connect with us on Facebook, Instagram or Twitter.

title: Business Development Manager, Clean Energy
locations_alt_raw: Washington, District of Columbia, United States
locations_derived: Washington, District of Columbia, United States
description_text:
The Opportunity
Rystad Energy is seeking a dynamic individual to join our Sales & Marketing Team as a Business Development Manager, Clean Energy and Power, to support our fast-growing research and consulting practice within the Energy Transition and Renewable Energy space in the US. The successful candidate must have exceptional new business generation skills with experience in solution selling and a background in or selling to this market. As part of the sales team, the role holders can expect the support from our global client-facing research analysts and product specialists. 
As a Business Development Manager, you will identify and qualify new business opportunities and will create strong relationships with prospective clients in the energy transition space. Solar, wind, storage, power, biofuels, CCUS, clean fuels and data center-related segments will be the primary client focus touched by this role. This will be a combination of targeting equipment manufacturers, developers, technology and data center players. Strong negotiation skills, knowledge of the North American clean energy industry, experience in selling services, a consultative selling approach, ability to quickly and effectively establish a presence in new markets and regions, product demonstrations and excellent networking skills are sought. 
Key Responsibilities
Build and execute sales and pipeline strategy to clean energy industry in North America
Qualify inbound and outbound leads to understanding clients' pain points, business needs and obstacles, and goals around energy transition
Present the company, our research and services in person and online at meetings industry events and social media
Communicate internally with research, sales colleagues and management on actives and results and provide feedback and suggestions on product enhancement and new product ideas
Work closely with Account Managers to ensure a smooth handoff of newly acquired clients
Maintain accurate metrics of prospect interactions in our CRM system, ensuring all data is up to date on a weekly basis 
Track progress toward meeting set KPIs and quota attainment, providing regular updates to Manager 
Skills & Attributes for Success
A Bachelor’s degree, Masters desirable
5-10 years sales new client acquisition in the clean energy space
Experience selling and dealing with C-Suites
Knowledge and genuine interest in the energy industry
Highly organized and efficient at managing day to day business with multiple priorities
Building value propositions for our databases based upon specific personas and company types
Goal oriented self-starter that can work independently, as part of a team and pull in resources as required
The ability to quickly and effectively build new networks, strong existing network a plus
English language skills are imperative. Additional languages would be an advantage
Strong oral and written communication skills
An experienced, confident, and self-motivated professional with a strong passion for sales and leadership.
A quick learner on new products and sales approaches
Familiar with standard Office tools and CRM systems
Travel & Location
Preferred Location is in one of Rystad Energy’s North America Offices: New York, Washington DC, Houston, or Calgary. 
What We Offer
- A global and quickly expanding international business culture
- A diverse, dynamic, and highly skilled working environment
- Development opportunities internationally
- Competitive compensation package and bonus plan
- 100% employer-paid healthcare premiums for you and your family
- 401(k) employer match up to 5%
- Four weeks of vacation time
Application process 
Please include a cover letter, CV and other relevant documents in a combined PDF file when you upload your application. All applications must be sent exclusively via our portal. MacOS users can experience difficulties in uploading documents. Please use a Windows PC in order to apply. Application deadline: March 1, 2026
About Rystad Energy
Headquartered in Oslo, Norway, and with offices across the globe, Rystad Energy is independent Energy research and business intelligence company providing data, tools, analytics, and consultancy services to clients exposed to the energy industry across the globe.
Rystad Energy has a range of global databases and research products for companies in the Oil & Gas, Oilfield Services, and Renewables sectors, as well as Investors, Investment Banks and Governments. We also provide a range of advisory services for our clients with capabilities across the Energy value chain.
Rystad Energy is a rapidly growing company providing the next generation analytical tools and advice for the industry. Rystad Energy combines a high-performance culture with a deeply collaborative ethos, providing ample opportunities for growth, learning, contribution, and career advancement. Read more at www.rystadenergy.com.
EEO Statement
Rystad Energy, Inc. provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability or genetics. In addition to federal law requirements, Rystad Energy, Inc. complies with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in every location in which the company has facilities. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.
Rystad Energy, Inc. expressly prohibits any form of workplace harassment based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, genetic information, disability, or veteran status. Improper interference with the ability of Rystad Energy, Inc.’s employees to perform their job duties may result in discipline up to and including discharge.

linkedin_org_description:
Rystad Energy is an independent research and intelligence company, dedicated to equipping clients with data, insights and education that power better decision-making.
 
Energy is the lifeblood of our company. Our bottom-up approach starts at the most granular level: we put the pieces together to make sense of the whole picture, create visions for the future and empower the decisions to get there. Our expertise spans energy, climate and the economy, including oil and gas, geopolitics, renewables and clean technologies, supply chains, power markets, and macroeconomics.
 
Founded in 2004 and headquartered in Oslo, Norway, we’ve grown to nearly 900 professionals across 31 global offices. Through a foundation of trust, respect and deep expertise, we deliver customer-focused intelligence, advisory services and ongoing support that helps global decision-makers navigate today’s dynamic markets.
